name: Rhubarb Slush
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot and bring to a boil, stirring until the sugar dissolves completely.
2. Remove from heat and strain the mixture into a pitcher or container.
3. Add 1 small package of strawberry Jello dissolved in 2 cups vodka.
4. Pour the mixture into an ice cream pail or similar large container.
5. Freeze until set.
6. Scoop into glasses and serve with 7-Up or Sprite.
